project_type: Flutter mobile app + FastAPI backend (to be created)
build_command: flutter analyze (frontend - SDK not available), python -m py_compile app/routers/voice.py (backend)
verification_instructions: 1. Run python -m py_compile on all new Python files. 2. Flutter analyze is not available (no SDK) so use dart analyze or syntax review.
setup_instructions: No Flutter SDK in sandbox. Python 3.12 available. Use py_compile for backend verification.
environment_constraints: No Flutter/Dart SDK installed. Python 3.12.13 available. Cannot run flutter analyze. Can verify Python files with py_compile. Branch: feature/project-setup-resolved.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main. Strict null safety. No dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. All routes have auth + rate limiting. Type hints on every Python function. Error handling everywhere. No print statements (use logging). No commented-out code. Constants instead of magic numbers.
key_patterns: Frontend: Riverpod ConsumerStatefulWidget pattern, Dio for HTTP via ApiService (singleton with interceptors), AppColors constants, GoogleFonts.dmSans for text styles, clean architecture (core/data/presentation). Backend structure per RULES.md: app/routers/, app/services/, app/models/, app/middleware/, app/utils/.
directory_structure: Root: RULES.md, README.md, frontend/. Frontend: lib/core/constants/, lib/data/services/, lib/data/repositories/, lib/presentation/screens/chat/, lib/presentation/widgets/chat/. Backend (to create): app/, app/routers/, app/services/, app/middleware/, app/config.py, requirements.txt, .env.example.
